hero_h1: Insurance in Tenerife, tailored to your situation

c1_d: Full coverage with no co-payments or waiting periods — valid for residency, the Digital Nomad Visa (DNV) and NLV.
c2_d: A policy for a study visa and Erasmus for the whole term — with medical care and support.
c3_d: Coverage of medical expenses abroad — for frequent travellers.
c4_d: Affordable policy: prevention, cleanings, treatment and discounts on complex procedures.
c5_d: Freedom to choose any clinic or doctor with partial cost reimbursement.
c6_d: Financial protection for your loved ones in unforeseen situations.
c7_d: Decesos policy: arrangements and full cost coverage, caring for your family.
c8_d: Veterinary care, civil liability and unexpected expenses.
c9_d: Policies for autónomos, freelancers and groups — health for employees and teams.

faq1_q: How much does the matching cost?
faq1_a: It's completely free. You pay us no commission — our job is to quickly understand your need and connect you with a manager who makes the quote.
faq2_q: What insurance is valid for a visa and residency?
faq2_a: For a visa and residency in Spain you need a policy with full coverage, no co-payments and no waiting periods. The manager finds exactly this for your case.
faq3_q: How will the manager contact me?
faq3_a: On your preferred messenger — WhatsApp, Telegram or Viber. You can message first to speed it up, or wait for the manager.
faq4_a: No. We are an information matching service. The quote, choice of company and policy issuance are handled by a licensed manager at a partner office in Tenerife.
faq5_q: Do I need to already live in Tenerife?
faq5_a: Not necessarily. We also help those who are only planning to move and are arranging a visa or residency in advance.
faq6_q: What do you do with my data?
faq6_a: Data is used only to find insurance and contact you, and is passed to the partner office manager. We comply with GDPR.
cta_p: 2 minutes, free and in your language. A manager will message you on your favourite messenger.
foot_disclaimer: An information service for finding insurance in Tenerife. We are not an insurance company or insurance broker. Requests are passed to a licensed partner office that handles the quote and policy issuance.
chat_greeting: Hi! 👋 I'll help you find insurance in a couple of minutes. Just answer a few questions.
chat_here: You can keep chatting right here — the manager will reply as soon as they join.
cookie_msg: We use only the cookies needed to run the site, plus anonymous analytics — enabled only with your consent. Declining keeps the full site working.
art_cta_p: Ask in the chat — we'll answer and a manager will calculate it for free.
blog_meta_desc: Guides to insurance on Tenerife: residency and visa, private healthcare, family, business. In plain words, in your language.
